ratings.comment: Very harsh grader for a 1 credit class about career development. Instrutions are unclear.
expects way too much for what the class is. especially since it was a 1 credit course.

Ive had understanding professors that care about my success before and Hannah is just not one of them. If you submit things due to any issues like Wi-Fi, apps crashing she simple doesnt care and will NOT make any exceptions. She doesnt even teach inter-he all she does is put YouTube videos from the 2000s together. Her teaching is so outdated.
